query:
SELECT 
  c.code as course_code,
  c.title as course_title,
  COUNT(qq.id) as quiz_count
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
LEFT JOIN quiz_questions qq ON l.id = qq.lessonId
WHERE c.code IN ('GED-MATH', 'GED-RLA', 'GED-SCI', 'GED-SS')
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code;
